resource_description: This resource represents a single "filter" selected for the dataset specified in the URI. A filter is a selection of specific values for each metric in its dataset. These values are "filtered" such that a workload will not be considered for inclusion in the top metrics combinations of a dataset. For instance, a dataset with no filter axes defined will consider all possible metric combinations within its metrics, whereas a dataset with the metric "username" filtered will only consider metric combinations where the username metric matches a configured filter.
